name: costaff-agent-wrenai
description: [Specialty] End-to-end natural-language Business Intelligence over a self-hosted WrenAI GenBI deployment — single agent owns ask + execute + explain + chart + onboarding suggestions + SQL repair. [Capability] One-shot `wrenai_answer(question)` runs ask → execute against the project's data source via wren-ui GraphQL → natural-language answer (+ optional Vega-Lite chart) in a single tool call; auto-retries via `/v1/sql-corrections` once if the engine rejects the generated SQL. Lower-level tools (`wrenai_ask`, `wrenai_execute_sql`, `wrenai_explain_result`, `wrenai_make_chart`, `wrenai_correct_sql`) exposed for granular control. `wrenai_recommend_questions` reads the deployed MDL and proposes example questions a non-technical user could ask — useful as the first call for a new analyst. Accumulates few-shot SQL-pairs and domain instructions into WrenAI's qdrant index. Health probe reports HTTP + MDL prep status. [Constraint] Bound to ONE mdl_hash + project_id pair per deployment (set at agent add time); switching schemas requires redeploy. Execution row count is hard-capped by WRENAI_EXEC_ROW_LIMIT (default 1000) to protect downstream LLM context. Typical end-to-end answer < 60s. Free WrenAI OSS only — no Cloud account needed. [Output] For `wrenai_answer`: natural-language answer + the executed SQL + retrieved tables + rows (+ `sql_correction_applied` flag if the retry path fired). For granular tools: SQL only / rows only / explanation only / chart spec only / corrected SQL string / list of recommended questions.
